Variables.Name: SourceType
Variables.Description:
Whether the module uses Bones or Sockets for locations.
	 
	 	BONESOCKETSOURCE_Bones		- Use Bones as the source locations.
	 	BONESOCKETSOURCE_Sockets	- Use Sockets as the source locations.

Variables.Name: UniversalOffset
Variables.Description: An offset to apply to each bonesocket

Variables.Name: SourceLocations
Variables.Description: The name(s) of the bonesocket(s) to position at. If this is empty, the module will attempt to spawn from all bones or sockets.

Variables.Name: SelectionMethod
Variables.Description:
The method by which to select the bonesocket to spawn at.
	 
	 	SEL_Sequential			- loop through the bonesocket array in order
	 	SEL_Random				- randomly select a bonesocket from the array

Variables.Name: bUpdatePositionEachFrame
Variables.Description: If true, update the particle locations each frame with that of the bonesocket

Variables.Name: bOrientMeshEmitters
Variables.Description: If true, rotate mesh emitter meshes to orient w the socket

Variables.Name: bInheritBoneVelocity
Variables.Description: If true, particles inherit the associated bone velocity when spawned

Variables.Name: InheritVelocityScale
Variables.Description: A scale on how much of the bone's velocity a particle will inherit.

Variables.Name: SkelMeshActorParamName
Variables.Description: The parameter name of the skeletal mesh actor that supplies the SkelMeshComponent for in-game.

Variables.Name: EditorSkelMesh
Variables.Description: The name of the skeletal mesh to use in the editor
